---
title: "Diverging Demographic Charts"
toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

{{< include _pop_setup.qmd >}}

```{r load_data}
# Fire-tract census joins (built by staging/prep_spatial_join.R). Each row is
# (wildfire_id × tract-at-fire's-vintage × census-period-closest-to-fire-year ×
# category). Fire side uses these directly; reference side below pools
# contemporaneous high-risk tracts to match.
by_wf_dir <- here('data/processed/nhgis')
race_by_wf <- read_parquet(file.path(by_wf_dir, 'race_by_wf.parquet'))
poverty_by_wf <- read_parquet(file.path(by_wf_dir, 'poverty_by_wf.parquet'))
vehicle_avail_by_wf <- read_parquet(file.path(
  by_wf_dir,
  'vehicle_avail_by_wf.parquet'
))
housing_cost_by_wf <- read_parquet(file.path(
  by_wf_dir,
  'housing_cost_by_wf.parquet'
))

# Tracts with WHP for high-risk identification — all vintages kept so we can
# build a reference set at each fire's contemporaneous tract vintage.
tract_sf <- bind_rows(
  read_sf(here('data/processed/tract_WHP_AK.geojson')) %>%
    filter(substr(GEOID, 1, 2) == '02'),
  read_sf(here('data/processed/tract_WHP_HI.geojson')) %>%
    filter(substr(GEOID, 1, 2) == '15'),
  read_sf(here('data/processed/tract_WHP_CONUS.geojson')) %>%
    filter(!(substr(GEOID, 1, 2) %in% c('02', '15')))
)

# Join tract-level population (most recent period per GEOID, ACS-preferred at
# ties). Used only for pop > 0 filter before the whp quantile cut.
tract_pop <- read_parquet(here('data/processed/nhgis/population.parquet')) %>%
  group_by(GEOID) %>%
  filter(start_year == max(start_year)) %>%
  filter(end_year == max(end_year)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(GEOID, pop)

tract_sf <- tract_sf %>%
  left_join(tract_pop, by = 'GEOID')

# Regions + fire-region assignment
regions <- read_sf(here('data/processed/regions.geojson'))
wfbz <- read_sf(here('data/raw/wfbz_disasters_2000-2025.geojson')) %>%
  filter(wildfire_year < 2025) %>%
  filter(wildfire_community_intersect)

wfbz_region <- wfbz %>%
  filter(!st_is_empty(geometry)) %>%
  select(wildfire_id) %>%
  mutate(
    usfs_region = regions$usfs_region[st_nearest_feature(geometry, regions)]
  ) %>%
  st_drop_geometry()
```

```{r high_risk_tracts}
# Assign USFS regions to tracts (by nearest-feature on tract geometry), then
# identify high-risk tracts per vintage: top 10% of whp_mean within each
# (usfs_region, census_year) group. Keeping census_year lets us build a
# reference set that matches each fire's contemporaneous tract vintage.
tract_risk <- tract_sf %>%
  filter(!is.na(whp_mean), !is.na(pop), pop > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    usfs_region = regions$usfs_region[st_nearest_feature(
      geometry,
      st_transform(regions, 4326)
    )]
  ) %>%
  st_drop_geometry()

high_risk_tracts <- tract_risk %>%
  group_by(usfs_region, census_year) %>%
  filter(whp_mean >= quantile(whp_mean, 0.9, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  distinct(GEOID, census_year, usfs_region)

# Fire counts per (census_year, period) bin — used to weight the reference
# composition so it matches the fire side's temporal mix. Same set of fires
# joins every demographic, so one `_by_wf` is sufficient.
fire_weights <- race_by_wf %>%
  distinct(wildfire_id, census_year, period)

fire_weights_overall <- fire_weights %>%
  count(census_year, period, name = 'n_fires')

fire_weights_reg <- fire_weights %>%
  inner_join(wfbz_region, by = 'wildfire_id') %>%
  bind_rows(., mutate(., usfs_region = 'Overall')) %>%
  distinct(wildfire_id, usfs_region, census_year, period) %>%
  count(usfs_region, census_year, period, name = 'n_fires')
```

```{r diverge_data}
# Fire-affected fracs: pool every (fire × nearby-tract-at-fire's-vintage ×
# category) row, using contemporaneous census/ACS data per fire.
fire_vehicle <- vehicle_avail_by_wf %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(count[no_vehicle == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "No vehicle")

fire_poverty <- poverty_by_wf %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(count[poverty_lt_100 == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Below poverty line")

fire_housing <- housing_cost_by_wf %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(count[cost_burdened == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Housing cost\nburdened")

# Reference population fracs: high-risk tracts at the same (census_year,
# period) the fire side is pulling from. Each fire contributes its vintage's
# full high-risk set once, via `fire_weights_overall`, so the reference is
# period-matched to the fire side.
pop_vehicle_all <- high_risk_tracts %>%
  inner_join(
    read_parquet(here('data/processed/nhgis/vehicle_avail.parquet')),
    by = 'GEOID',
    relationship = 'many-to-many'
  ) %>%
  inner_join(fire_weights_overall, by = c('census_year', 'period')) %>%
  summarize(
    frac_pop = sum(n_fires * count * (no_vehicle == TRUE), na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(n_fires * count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "No vehicle")

pop_poverty_all <- high_risk_tracts %>%
  inner_join(
    read_parquet(here('data/processed/nhgis/poverty_lt_100.parquet')),
    by = 'GEOID',
    relationship = 'many-to-many'
  ) %>%
  inner_join(fire_weights_overall, by = c('census_year', 'period')) %>%
  summarize(
    frac_pop = sum(n_fires * count * (poverty_lt_100 == TRUE), na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(n_fires * count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Below poverty line")

pop_housing_all <- high_risk_tracts %>%
  inner_join(
    read_parquet(here('data/processed/nhgis/housing_cost_burden.parquet')),
    by = 'GEOID',
    relationship = 'many-to-many'
  ) %>%
  inner_join(fire_weights_overall, by = c('census_year', 'period')) %>%
  summarize(
    frac_pop = sum(n_fires * count * (cost_burdened == TRUE), na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(n_fires * count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Housing cost\nburdened")

#pop_white_all <- read_parquet(here('data/processed/nhgis/race.parquet')) %>%
#  most_recent_period() %>%
#  filter(GEOID %in% high_risk_geoids) %>%
#  summarize(
#    frac_pop = sum(
#      count[
#        ethnicity == "Not Hispanic or Latino" & race == "White (single race)"
#      ],
#      na.rm = TRUE
#    ) /
#      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
#  ) %>%
#  mutate(stat = "Non-Hispanic White")

# National diverging data
stat_order <- c(
  "No vehicle",
  "Below poverty line",
  "Housing cost\nburdened",
  "NH Other",
  "NH Two or\nMore Races",
  "NH White",
  "Hispanic (any)",
  "NH Black",
  "NH AIAN, Asian,\nor Pacific Islander"
)

# Regional diverging data: fire side (pool of fire × tract × category rows)
fire_vehicle_reg <- vehicle_avail_by_wf %>%
  inner_join(wfbz_region, by = 'wildfire_id') %>%
  bind_rows(., mutate(., usfs_region = 'Overall')) %>%
  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(count[no_vehicle == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "No vehicle")

fire_poverty_reg <- poverty_by_wf %>%
  inner_join(wfbz_region, by = 'wildfire_id') %>%
  bind_rows(., mutate(., usfs_region = 'Overall')) %>%
  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(count[poverty_lt_100 == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Below poverty line")

fire_housing_reg <- housing_cost_by_wf %>%
  inner_join(wfbz_region, by = 'wildfire_id') %>%
  bind_rows(., mutate(., usfs_region = 'Overall')) %>%
  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(count[cost_burdened == TRUE], na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Housing cost\nburdened")

#fire_white_reg <- race_by_wf %>%
#  inner_join(wfbz_region, by = 'wildfire_id') %>%
#  bind_rows(., mutate(., usfs_region = 'Overall')) %>%
#  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
#  summarize(
#    frac = sum(
#      count[
#        ethnicity == "Not Hispanic or Latino" & race == "White (single race)"
#      ],
#      na.rm = TRUE
#    ) /
#      sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)
#  ) %>%
#  mutate(stat = "Non-Hispanic White")

# Regional pop side: high-risk tracts per region, weighted by fires per
# (usfs_region, census_year, period) so the reference matches the fire side's
# region- and vintage-specific mix. 'Overall' is materialized on both sides
# via the `bind_rows` above / fire_weights_reg construction.
pop_vehicle_reg <- high_risk_tracts %>%
  bind_rows(., mutate(., usfs_region = 'Overall')) %>%
  inner_join(
    read_parquet(here('data/processed/nhgis/vehicle_avail.parquet')),
    by = 'GEOID',
    relationship = 'many-to-many'
  ) %>%
  inner_join(
    fire_weights_reg,
    by = c('usfs_region', 'census_year', 'period')
  ) %>%
  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac_pop = sum(n_fires * count * (no_vehicle == TRUE), na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(n_fires * count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "No vehicle")

pop_poverty_reg <- high_risk_tracts %>%
  bind_rows(., mutate(., usfs_region = 'Overall')) %>%
  inner_join(
    read_parquet(here('data/processed/nhgis/poverty_lt_100.parquet')),
    by = 'GEOID',
    relationship = 'many-to-many'
  ) %>%
  inner_join(
    fire_weights_reg,
    by = c('usfs_region', 'census_year', 'period')
  ) %>%
  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac_pop = sum(n_fires * count * (poverty_lt_100 == TRUE), na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(n_fires * count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Below poverty line")

pop_housing_reg <- high_risk_tracts %>%
  bind_rows(., mutate(., usfs_region = 'Overall')) %>%
  inner_join(
    read_parquet(here('data/processed/nhgis/housing_cost_burden.parquet')),
    by = 'GEOID',
    relationship = 'many-to-many'
  ) %>%
  inner_join(
    fire_weights_reg,
    by = c('usfs_region', 'census_year', 'period')
  ) %>%
  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
  summarize(
    frac_pop = sum(n_fires * count * (cost_burdened == TRUE), na.rm = TRUE) /
      sum(n_fires * count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(stat = "Housing cost\nburdened")

# Race diverging data — shared collapsing helper
collapse_race <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      stat = case_when(
        str_detect(race_group, "Black or African American") ~ "NH Black",
        str_detect(
          race_group,
          "American Indian|Asian|Pacific Islander|Native Hawaiian"
        ) ~ "NH AIAN, Asian,\nor Pacific Islander",
        str_detect(race_group, "Some Other Race") ~ "NH Other",
        str_detect(race_group, "White") ~ "NH White",
        str_detect(race_group, "Two or More Races") ~ "NH Two or\nMore Races",
        TRUE ~ race_group
      )
    )
}

# National fire race (pool of fire × tract × category rows)
fire_race <- race_by_wf %>%
  mutate(
    race_group = if_else(
      ethnicity == "Hispanic or Latino",
      "Hispanic (any)",
      race
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(race_group) %>%
  summarize(count = sum(count, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(frac = count / sum(count)) %>%
  select(race_group, frac)

# National pop race — high-risk tracts at fire-matched vintage/period,
# weighted by n_fires per (census_year, period).
pop_race <- high_risk_tracts %>%
  inner_join(
    read_parquet(here('data/processed/nhgis/race.parquet')),
    by = 'GEOID',
    relationship = 'many-to-many'
  ) %>%
  inner_join(fire_weights_overall, by = c('census_year', 'period')) %>%
  mutate(
    race_group = if_else(
      ethnicity == "Hispanic or Latino",
      "Hispanic (any)",
      race
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(race_group) %>%
  summarize(count = sum(n_fires * count, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(frac_pop = count / sum(count)) %>%
  select(race_group, frac_pop)

diverge_race_national <- left_join(fire_race, pop_race, by = 'race_group') %>%
  collapse_race() %>%
  group_by(stat) %>%
  summarize(frac = sum(frac), frac_pop = sum(frac_pop), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  mutate(diff = frac - frac_pop)

# Regional fire race (pool of fire × tract × category rows)
fire_race_reg <- race_by_wf %>%
  inner_join(wfbz_region, by = 'wildfire_id') %>%
  bind_rows(., mutate(., usfs_region = 'Overall')) %>%
  mutate(
    race_group = if_else(
      ethnicity == "Hispanic or Latino",
      "Hispanic (any)",
      race
    )
  ) %>%
  collapse_race() %>%
  group_by(usfs_region, stat) %>%
  summarize(
    frac = sum(count, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
  mutate(frac = frac / sum(frac)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Regional pop race — high-risk tracts at fire-matched vintage/period,
# weighted by n_fires per (usfs_region, census_year, period).
pop_race_reg <- high_risk_tracts %>%
  bind_rows(., mutate(., usfs_region = 'Overall')) %>%
  inner_join(
    read_parquet(here('data/processed/nhgis/race.parquet')),
    by = 'GEOID',
    relationship = 'many-to-many'
  ) %>%
  inner_join(
    fire_weights_reg,
    by = c('usfs_region', 'census_year', 'period')
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    race_group = if_else(
      ethnicity == "Hispanic or Latino",
      "Hispanic (any)",
      race
    )
  ) %>%
  collapse_race() %>%
  group_by(usfs_region, stat) %>%
  summarize(count = sum(n_fires * count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  group_by(usfs_region) %>%
  mutate(frac_pop = count / sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(usfs_region, stat, frac_pop)


diverge_national <- bind_rows(
  bind_cols(fire_vehicle, pop_vehicle_all %>% select(frac_pop)),
  bind_cols(fire_poverty, pop_poverty_all %>% select(frac_pop)),
  bind_cols(fire_housing, pop_housing_all %>% select(frac_pop)) #,
  #bind_cols(fire_white, pop_white_all %>% select(frac_pop))
) %>%
  bind_rows(diverge_race_national) %>%
  mutate(
    diff = frac - frac_pop,
    stat = factor(stat, levels = stat_order)
  )

diverge_regional <- bind_rows(
  left_join(fire_vehicle_reg, pop_vehicle_reg, by = c('usfs_region', 'stat')),
  left_join(fire_poverty_reg, pop_poverty_reg, by = c('usfs_region', 'stat')),
  left_join(fire_housing_reg, pop_housing_reg, by = c('usfs_region', 'stat')),
  left_join(fire_race_reg, pop_race_reg, by = c('usfs_region', 'stat'))
) %>%
  mutate(
    diff = frac - frac_pop,
    stat = factor(stat, levels = stat_order)
  ) %>%
  left_join(REGION_ORDER, by = 'usfs_region') %>%
  replace_na(list(plot_order = 11)) %>%
  mutate(usfs_region = fct_reorder(usfs_region, plot_order))
```

### Overall

```{r diverge_overall_fig, fig.height = 2}
#| fig-cap: "Difference in fire-affected vs. high-wildfire-risk population shares, pooled 2000-2024"
div_theme <- pop_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
  )
dat <- diverge_national %>%
  mutate(
    race_var = if_else(
      str_detect(stat, '(^NH|Hispanic)'),
      'Race & Ethnicity',
      'SES'
    )
  )
plotme <- function(dat) {
  ggplot(
    dat,
    aes(x = diff, y = stat)
  ) +
    geom_col(
      fill = khroma::color('light', reverse = FALSE)(1),
      color = "grey25",
      linewidth = .1
    ) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = 'grey25', linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_text(
      aes(
        x = 0,
        label = stat,
        hjust = (.6 * diff / abs(diff)) + .5,
      ),
      size = 2
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = .1),
      n.breaks = 6,
      expand = c(.004, 0)
    ) +
    xlab("Fire-affected minus high-risk reference (percentage points)") +
    ylab(NULL) +
    div_theme +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(
        angle = 0,
        hjust = .5,
        size = 8,
        lineheight = .75
      ),
      #axis.text.y = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = .5),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      panel.spacing.y = unit(0, 'pt'),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "grey25", fill = NA, linewidth = .25)
    )
}


p_ses <- plotme(filter(dat, race_var == 'SES'))
p_race <- plotme(filter(dat, race_var == 'Race & Ethnicity'))

ggsave(
  here('figures/diverge_national_ses.pdf'),
  p_ses,
  width = 8,
  height = 2
)

ggsave(
  here('figures/diverge_national_race_ethn.pdf'),
  p_race,
  width = 8,
  height = 3
)

p_ses
```

```{r, fig.height = 3, fig.width = 8}
p_race
```

### By Region

```{r diverge_regional_fig, fig.height = 4, fig.width = 8}
#| fig-cap: "Difference in fire-affected vs. high-wildfire-risk population shares by USFS region, pooled 2000-2024"
dat <- diverge_regional %>%
  mutate(
    race_var = if_else(
      str_detect(stat, '(^NH|Hispanic)'),
      'Race & Ethnicity',
      'SES'
    )
  )
plotme <- function(dat) {
  ggplot(
    dat,
    aes(x = diff, y = usfs_region, fill = usfs_region)
  ) +
    geom_col(width = 1, color = "grey25", linewidth = .1) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = 'grey25', linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_text(
      aes(
        x = 0,
        label = usfs_region,
        hjust = (.6 * diff / abs(diff)) + .5,
      ),
      size = 2
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c('black', rev(region_colors))) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
      n.breaks = 8
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~stat, ncol = 1, scale = 'fixed', strip.position = 'left') +
    xlab("Fire-affected minus high-risk reference (percentage points)") +
    ylab(NULL) +
    div_theme +
    theme(
      strip.text.y = element_text(
        angle = 0,
        hjust = .5,
        size = 8,
        lineheight = .75
      ),
      #  axis.text.y = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      panel.spacing.y = unit(0, 'pt'),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "grey25", fill = NA, linewidth = .25)
    )
}

p_ses <- plotme(filter(dat, race_var == 'SES'))
p_race <- plotme(filter(dat, race_var == 'Race & Ethnicity'))

ggsave(
  here('figures/diverge_regional_ses.pdf'),
  p_ses,
  width = 8,
  height = 4
)

ggsave(
  here('figures/diverge_regional_race_ethn.pdf'),
  p_race,
  width = 8,
  height = 6
)

p_ses
```

```{r, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 8}
p_race
```

```{r diverge_race_fig, fig.height = 3}
#| fig-cap: "Race/ethnicity composition: fire-affected minus high-wildfire-risk population share, pooled 2000-2024"
#ggplot(diverge_race, aes(x = diff, y = race_group)) +
#  geom_col(
#    fill = khroma::color('light', reverse = FALSE)(1),
#    color = "grey25",
#    linewidth = .1
#  ) +
#  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = 'grey25', linewidth = 0.4) +
#  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
#  xlab("Fire-affected minus high-risk reference (percentage points)") +
#  ylab(NULL) +
#  div_theme +
#  theme(
#    panel.border = element_rect(color = "grey25", fill = NA, linewidth = .25)
#  )
#ggsave(
#  here('figures/diverge_race_fig.pdf'),
#  last_plot(),
#  width = 2.3,
#  height = 1
#)
```


## Debug

```{r}
#race_high_risk <- read_parquet(here('data/processed/nhgis/race.parquet')) %>%
#  most_recent_period() %>%
#  inner_join(high_risk_tracts, by = 'GEOID') %>%
#  mutate(
#    race_group = paste0(
#      "NH ",
#      if_else(ethnicity == "Hispanic or Latino", "Hispanic (any)", race)
#    )
#  ) %>%
#  collapse_race() %>%
#  inner_join(tracts(year = 2020, state = 'CA'), .)
#
#
#race_fire <- read_parquet(here(
#  'data/processed/nhgis/race_by_wf.parquet'
#)) %>%
#  most_recent_period() %>%
#  inner_join(high_risk_tracts, by = 'GEOID') %>%
#  inner_join(tracts(year = 2020, state = 'CA'), .)
#
#race <- bind_rows(
#  fire_affected = race_fire,
#  high_risk = race_high_risk,
#  .id = 'type'
#)
#
#ggplot(data = race) +
#  geom_sf(fill = )
```
